title: The Activation
overview:
Nakahito Kagura and a few friends of his decide to investigate an abandoned house.

Since Nakahito's family has a history of magic, they decide that Nakahito should go with them to take care of the rumoured mad-scientist living there.

title: A One-Master Kinda Gal
overview:
Dr. Amagi attempts to coerce Dr. Ayanokoji into working with the Japanese military.

Meanwhile, Amagi mistakenly grabs Nakahito and Kurumi has to rescue him.

title: Cold Saki
overview:
A new character by the name of Dr. Brandow joins the Imperial Army, even more interesting is it seems as though he has been previously part of the Steel Angel Project.

Meanwhile, Nakahito must now become accustom to rude awakenings, while Dr. Ayanokoji is convinced the Imperial Army will not be able to awaken the second Steel Angel prototype.

title: Don't Hate Me!
overview:
The Imperial Army's preparation for the second Steel Angel's completion draws closer.

Meanwhile, Nakahito finds himself haunted by the words of Dr.Ayanakoji stating that only Nakahito has control over Kurumi.

title: Warm Saki
overview:
As Kurumi finds herself forced into battle with Saki, she hesitates, giving Saki the upper hand.

In an effort to help, Nakahito seems to just make things worse and discovers that his words put Kurumi in this dilemma. As the fight continues it seems as though no one can help against the wrath of Saki.

What will be the final outcome?

title: Love Shack
overview:
With the kidnapping of Dr. Ayanokoji it seems that in return a new (and unexpected) member has joined in his place.

Meanwhile, Saki quickly redeems herself as she helps to rebuild what she had at one point destroyed.

title: Playing Doctor
overview:
The group"s trip to Izumo comes to a halt when Nakahito gets a stomachache.

Meanwhile, Kurumi, Nakahito, and Amagi go see a doctor, but this doctor isn't your normal kind of doctor.

title: Tsunami
overview:
A large boulder is blocking the path of the train to our comrade’s destination, Dr. Amagi searches for other transportation while the army tries to remove the boulder.

Meanwhile, Nakahito learns more about Dr. Ayanakoji's past from Dr. Amagi.

title: Fireworks
overview: The group spends the night at a fireworks festival, but the sparks really fly when Nakahito is kidnapped and Kurumi sets off to find him.

title: Triple Threat
overview: Kurumi finds herself fighting Nakahito's kidnappers, the Steel Angels Kaga, Tsunami, and Kaori.

title: Cinnamon Cookies
overview: A couple of incidents get Kurumi thinking that there is something going on between Nakahito and Saki.

title: Karinka
overview: Kurumi, Nakahito, and Dr. Amagi go to Kyoto to find Saki, who is beaten badly by another new Steel Angel, Karinka.

title: Second Sister
overview: Kurumi fights Steel Angel Karinka. Can Kurumi's Mark II Angel Heart prevail over Karinka's two hearts?

title: It's Not Fair
overview: Karinka disguises herself and tries to find out Kurumi's secret.

title: Dark Wings
overview: Karinka finds herself working as a waitress with Kurumi and Nakahito in an effort to find out the secret to Kurumi's power.

title: Our Lips Are Sealed
overview: Karinka's new goal is to get a kiss from Nakahito so that she can become more powerful than Kurumi.

title: Mikhail
overview: Kurumi and the gang finally arrives in Izumo, where they learn many secrets about Dr. Ayanokoji. Also, Nakahito meets a young boy...

title: Lies
overview: Mikhail tells Nakahito about the potential danger of Kurumi's Angel Mark II Heart.

title: Storming The Base
overview: Kurumi, Saki, Karinka, and Dr. Amagi arrive at the Academy Base to rescue Nakahito. However, the Steel Angels fall into the Academy's traps, and Dr. Amagi meets face-to-face with Dr. Walski.

title: Avenging Angel
overview: An angered Kurumi continues her search for Nakahito, but she runs into and fights Steel Angel Mikhail.

title: When Angels Die
overview: The battle between Kurumi and Mikhail continues. However, Kurumi is being consumed by demonic energy to the point that she grows black wings.

title: Hell's Angel
overview: After beating Mikhail, the demonically possesed Kurumi attacks dr.Walski's base!

title: Crime and Punishment
overview:
Kurumi (in demon possesion) attacks the academy base, the damage is fatal.

In order to stop Kurumi, all the steel angels drain themselves to the point of de-activation to power the ultimate weapon to stop Kurumi's destructive powers.

title: Kiss
overview: Nakahito makes one final attempt to stop Kurumi from destroying everything.

title: Things That Really Suck!
overview: Nako Kagura is a girl skilled in playing the cello. One day, she and her friend Iruka go down an underground cavern, which has a statue containing Steel Angel Kurumi Mark II!

title: Master is a Girl
overview: Kurumi is released from her capsule and kisses her new master who just happens to be a girl... the girl's mother welcomes Kurumi with open arms and helps her get an outfit for Kurumi shall be joining her new master at school, which someone close to Nako isn't happy about.

title: The First...It Is?
overview: Kurumi and Nako arrive (late) to their new school. The two's odd relationship gives them unwanted attention, especially when Uruka's dad sends a robot after Kurumi!

title: The New Steel Angel Saki Mark II
overview: Uruka's dad discovers a Steel Angel like Kurumi named Saki. Uruka snoops around Nako's house to find the manual on how to activate Steel Angels.

title: Master and Sister
overview: Now that Steel Angel Saki Mark II has been activated, Uruka tries to make her fight against Kurumi.

title: Kurumi Becomes a Fish
overview: Kurumi and the gang spend summer at the beach. But Uruka sets a trap for Kurumi in the water.

title: Awaken, Karinka Mark II
overview: Kurumi and Uruka worry when Nako is late for dinner. Meanwhile, many practitioners attempt to awaken the next Steel Angel, Karinka Mark II.

title: How Do Ya Do, Sistaz?
overview: Saki tries to get Kurumi and Uruka to be with her, but ends up being used as bait set up by the newly-activated Karinka Mark II.

title: Rain, Shine, and a Rainbow
overview: Kurumi finds herself fighting the powerful Steel Angel Karinka.

title: Big Part-Time Job Plans!
overview: Kurumi and Karinka get in an argument and accidently break Nako's cello. So, while Nako practices her cello skills with many other cellos at Uruka's house, Kurumi and Karinka get part-time jobs to buy a new cello for Nako.

title: Master Will Go Away
overview: Nako's cello contest is coming soon, and if Nako wins, then she will get to study abroad in Vienna. Kurumi and Karinka contemplate on how to feel about Nako going away. Meanwhile, Uruka persuades her father to use a special suit to prevent Nako from leaving her.

title: Beyond the Clear Blue Sky
overview: Can Kurumi keep Karinka and the battle-suit-equipped Uruka at bay and make it to the cello contest before Nako's turn comes up?
